text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. Two key tasks in this field are image recognition and object detection. Image recognition allows a computer to identify what an image shows, such as a cat or a tree. Object detection goes a step further by finding and locating multiple objects within an image or video. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision systems analyse camera feeds to recognise pedestrians, traffic signs, and other vehicles, helping the car make safe driving decisions.
